name: Seviche
recipeIngredient: 1 pound fillet of fish (firm mild fish like turbot or orange roughy)
2 large ripe tomatoes, peeled and diced
3 tablespoons chopped cilantro (use parsley if fresh cilantro is unavailable)
recipeInstructions:
1 Cut the fish into small cubes and place in a glass bowl. Cover with lemon juice (or a mixture of lime and lemon juices). Let stand in the refrigerator, covered, for at least 8 hours. This "cooks" the fish.
2 Add the remaining ingredients, except avocado, to the bowl. Refrigerate for a few more hours.
3 When ready to serve, stir in the diced avocados.
